title: Processes of a supranational regulatory authority
challenge: A complex regulatory domain and a high risk of failing acceptance testing.
actions: Designed the solution and supported development.
result: Two processes passed acceptance testing on the first attempt.

title: Machine-readable powers of attorney
challenge: New legislation and no existing solution in the product.
result: The solution was implemented and brought to production.

title: Contact centre monitoring
challenge: Data from several digital channels had to be consolidated and made useful for management.
result: Managers received clear performance metrics for chats and messengers.

title: Operational reporting modernisation
challenge: Reporting relied on manual Excel processing and did not scale with increasing data volumes.
actions: Defined required metrics and data sources.
Moved storage and processing into databases.
Configured visualisations in Power BI and Qlik Sense.
result: Reporting evolved from manual Excel work to a more reliable database and BI setup.

title: Report builder
challenge: Contact centre administrators depended on developers whenever they needed a new report or dashboard.
actions: Designed an intuitive report configuration flow.
Defined the builder interface and available parameters.
result: Administrators became able to create the dashboards they needed without ongoing development support.
